name: Chocolate Covered White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Semisweet chocolate, broken into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix crumbled cookies and melted butter, then press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in melted white chocolate and pour over crust.
4. Bake for 40 minutes. Turn off oven and let the cake cool inside the oven as it cools down.
5. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool completely.
6. Chill for at least 4 hours. Remove the rim.
7. Heat heavy cream, butter, and sugar in a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir to dissolve sugar crystals, then bring to a boil.
8. Put chocolate pieces into a stainless steel bowl and pour boiling cream mixture over it, letting stand for a few minutes. Stir until smooth.
9. Cover the sides and top of cheesecake with the ganache, smoothing it out, and chill at least 2 hours to set.
